title: Create React Native API client for Laravel mobile API
goal: Centralize all mobile HTTP requests, x-api-key handling, Bearer token handling, and API error normalization.
implementation_steps: Create a base API client module.
Throw a clear development error if API URL or API key is missing.
Every request must include Accept: application/json.
When a token is provided, include Authorization: Bearer {token}.
Support JSON request bodies for login/register.
Support query string requests for QR lookup.
If response is not ok, throw a normalized ApiError with status and message.
Create typed API functions: login, register, logout, getMe, and lookupBookByQrCode.
error_handling_rules: 401 from invalid x-api-key should show a setup/configuration error.
401 from missing/expired Bearer token should trigger logout.
404 from lookup should show 'No book found for this QR code.'.
Network failure should show 'Cannot connect to the library server.'.
acceptance_criteria: API errors are normalized into predictable error objects.
TypeScript types exist for AuthUser, AuthResponse, BookDetails, and ApiError.
